title: Yarn tension alarm stops SM8-TOP2V production
online_resolution_steps: Record the alarm screen before resetting.
Check whether the alarm is limited to one feed or appears across multiple feeds.
Inspect yarn path, tensioner, and yarn package resistance.
Restart only after confirming there is no mechanical obstruction.
online_resolution_steps_zh: 复位前先拍照记录报警界面。
确认报警只出现在单路纱，还是多路纱同时出现。
检查纱路、张力器和纱筒退绕阻力是否异常。
确认没有机械卡阻后，再尝试安全重启。
safety_warnings: Do not bypass safety covers or sensors.
Stop the machine before touching yarn path or moving parts.
safety_warnings_zh: 不要短接或绕过安全门、护罩或传感器。
接触纱路或运动部件前必须停机。
dispatch_triggers: alarm repeats after safe restart and basic yarn path check
multiple feeds fail at the same time
sensor or wiring damage is visible
customer cannot safely perform the check
dispatch_triggers_zh: 安全重启和基础纱路检查后报警仍重复出现
可见传感器或线缆损坏
客户无法安全完成检查
estimated_resolution_time: 30-60 minutes online if yarn path issue; onsite same day if sensor/wiring suspected
estimated_resolution_time_zh: 如果是纱路/张力器问题，在线排查约 30-60 分钟；如果怀疑传感器或线缆问题，建议当天现场处理。
confidence_notes: Mock case for workflow design. Needs validation by Santoni service team.

title: Lock-machine activation password after motherboard replacement
online_resolution_steps: Collect the machine serial number, preferably from nameplate photo.
Collect the machine code shown on the lock screen.
Mock tool checks whether the serial number exists and whether the platform status allows password generation.
If allowed, generate the activation password and return it to the onsite customer or agent technician.
safety_warnings: Do not expose platform credentials in chat or logs.
Only return a generated activation password when the platform status allows it.
probable_causes: motherboard replacement triggered lease lock state
machine requires activation password before production can continue
dispatch_triggers: customer cannot provide serial number or machine code
machine remains locked after password entry
manual_escalation_triggers: serial number is not found in platform
lease expiry date is earlier than today
platform data indicates unresolved lease/payment status
estimated_resolution_time: 5-10 minutes online if serial and lease status are valid; manual intervention required if platform data is missing or expired.
confidence_notes: Extracted from Joey's lock-machine activation password service thread on 2026-05-18. Credentials and real platform access are intentionally excluded from mock data.
